questions.question: Where should business logic live in a Clean Architecture?
questions.expectedAnswer: In the domain/entity layer and use case layer. Not in controllers, not in repositories, not in framework code.
questions.rubric: Must identify domain/use case layers and exclude controllers/repositories

questions.question: What is the N+1 query problem and how do you solve it?
questions.expectedAnswer: N+1 occurs when code executes 1 query to get a list of N items, then N additional queries to get related data for each item. Solve with eager loading, joins, or batch queries.
questions.rubric: Must explain the problem and at least one solution
